mechanics.excerpt: Free Rasalhague Republic The currency of the FRR is the krona (different from the Lyran kroneri, which divided into 100 aurar; Use 0f the krona (symbol: KA or R-bill} declined markedly in the years following the Clan invasion, wnen was largely replaced by the ComStar C-bill.
